text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before the Satsuki Sho, Maruzensky tells me
that running has lost all of its joy for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take the melancholy Maruzensky to watch the
younger students as they train hard, trying to
catch up to their role model.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week and Grass Wonder happily train
late into the evening, dreaming of someday
catching up to Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing them, Maruzensky realizes that her
running has the power to inspire people and bring
them joy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To set an example for the other students,
Maruzensky becomes determined to run her heart
out at the Satsuki Sho.
